findings: validate_record() enhanced with repo_root parameter for evidence file existence verification
evidence_binding field provides checked, all_exist, missing, found structure
Missing evidence files produce explicit errors and fail validation
Backward compatibility maintained: without repo_root, binding check skipped
6 new tests cover all evidence binding scenarios
limitations: validate_record does not formally reject when exit_conditions says decision_evidence_attached=true but evidence_files is empty
create_record does not formally reject empty task_id
Evidence pack manifest run_id differs from prompt run_id; should unify
